prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-BATTLETANK-GRYCM Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): TychoTyke Existing Title: TychoTyke Remote Control Army Military War RC Tank with Lights Sounds, Gray Camo, Boys, Ages 3+ Description: The toys for boys TychoTyke Remote Control Army Military War RC Tank with lights and sounds will have your little hero ready to head into battle and save the day. With a high-quality light up design, green and gray camouflage coloring, vibrant lights and realistic sounds, your little soldier will enjoy endless hours of pretend play with this awesome, battery-operated RC tank toys for boys.

The RC tank moves in any direction with its easy-to-use wheel-shaped remote control unit, and has a fully functioning turret that turns a full 360-degrees. The RC tank also comes with bright lights and loud sounds make this RC tank toys for boys even more engaging and realistic during playtime. The vibrant lights and realistic sounds will captivate your child as they reenact various army military war pretend play scenarios solo or with friends or family. The RC tank has been designed with small hands in mind, perfectly sized for kids ages three and up.

And, not only will your little hero be thrilled and occupied for hours with this army military war remote control RC tank, kids will be developing and engaging their fine motor skills, hand eye coordination and dexterity, maneuvering the RC tank indoors or out with the remote control unit.

Kids will have a blast playing out rescue missions, whether saving civilians or forging through cross desert top secret excursions, with this super fun remote control tank toy.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Note: Batteries NOT included Search Terms: toys for boys christmas gifts hanukkah gifts stocking stuffer remote control toys marines combat kids toys children toddlers brother gifts learning and education toys toy vehicle playsets toys for 5 year old boys toys for 3 year old boys birthday Features: - ARMY MILITARY CAMO RC TANK TOY: Featuring sleek grey camo coloring, loud sounds and vibrant lights, this war themed RC tank will have your little hero excited to save the day! Kids will have a blast playing out rescue missions or forging through cross desert excursions with this super fun remote control tank toy - AWESOME RC TANK LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: In addition to a 360 turret and quick realistic movements, the RC tank also comes with bright lights and loud sounds make this RC tank toys for boys even more engaging and realistic during playtime! - FINE MOTOR TOYS: Not only will your little hero be thrilled and occupied for hours with this army military war remote control RC tank, kids will be developing and engaging their fine motor skills, hand eye coordination and dexterity maneuvering the RC tank indoors or out with the remote control unit - EASY TO USE REMOTE CONTROL TOY: Moving in any direction with the easy to use radio controlled remote control wheel unit, little soldiers in training will have a blast driving and being in control of their RC tank, whether they're playing solo or engaged in an epic RC battle, indoors or out! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 17 x 6 x 5 inches; Color: Grey Camo; Weight: 1.3lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Note: Batteries not included with purchase; Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
